notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-030 is a metadata-only request normalization pack: it normalizes the Test And Golden Case Set S02 request after CP00-029/S01 and RP00.P02.M06.S11 while refusing test execution, golden fixture generation, golden fixture persistence, runtime route creation, service logic execution, database writes, storage writes, and product-state persistence.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-030 evidence files did not exist yet.

The completed read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-030; raw verdict was approve_with_conditions, and all P1/P2 items are resolved or adjudicated by this pack evidence, strengthened negative tests, and final validation.

evidence_summary.implementation: RP00.P02.M07.S02 request normalization policy, normalizer, validators, fixture mirror, README entry, contract ledger row, and RP00 validator coverage were added.
evidence_summary.tests: Control-plane service tests include policy binding, frozen metadata normalization, unsafe input fail-closed coverage, normalizer no-write handoff, fixture mirror checks, and derived S01 service_entrypoint_contract_ref pinning.
evidence_summary.hermes_evidence: H00 command ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate and spec_requirement_validate are represented in the final command evidence.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains outside this metadata-only S02 normalization pack; the explicit next goal boundary is RP00.P02.M07.S03 tenant boundary precheck.

preliminary_expected_failures.summary: Pre-evidence RP00 validation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-030 evidence files did not exist yet.

commands.summary: 488 tests passed after CP00-030 implementation and post-review P2 negative coverage strengthening.

commands.command: claude --no-session-persistence -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --system-prompt "read-only pack-level code reviewer" --output-format text --max-budget-usd 5
commands.summary: Single valid pack-level read-only review completed; raw verdict approve_with_conditions, raw findings P0=0/P1=1/P2=1/P3=3, unresolved after adjudication P0=0/P1=0/P2=0.
